title: Loom work order (frontmatter)
description: Machine-checkable shape of a work order's YAML frontmatter. Body sections are defined in loom/execution/work-orders.md and templates/work-order.md.

id.description: Unique within the pack, e.g. WO-007

title.description: Verb + outcome. Conjunctions ('and', 'also') signal a needed split.

depends_on.description: WO ids (and open D- decision ids that block this WO). Must form a DAG across the pack.

routing.description: Capability class per loom/execution/routing.md — never a model name.

size.description: S: <1h, M: one sitting. There is deliberately no L — split it.

last_verified.description: Date the WO's inlined facts were last checked against the repo.

touches.description: Path globs this WO may modify. Concurrently-ready WOs must have disjoint touches (loom/execution/parallel-work.md); overlap is lint W07.

assumptions.description: Ledger ids this WO rests on (mirrors the Epistemic notes section).
